meaning: 坎帕尼亚区[意大利行政区名]
examples: The postal code of Benevento, Campania, Italy is 82013.
The postal code of Bonea, Benevento, Campania, Italy is 82013.
The old record-breaking Cunard liner Campania had just been sold for scrap.
The investigation is part of a broader audit of EU-funded projects in Campania, currently under way.
Campania, a Clyde-built, Blue Riband-winning Cunard liner wrecked in the Firth of Forth just off Burntisland in 1918.
